title.en: Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen also participated in th...

content.en:
this day.

The Black Wind Mountain Miaofa Dao Ancestor led the Eternal Dao Ancestor, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, the Gengjin Dao Ancestor, the Hengguang Dao Ancestor, and the Spirit Crane Dao Ancestor, a total of six half-step domain ancestors to participate in the battlefield against the Forbidden Zerg.

In addition, many invincible Dao Ancestors and a large number of supreme Dao Ancestors participated in the battle one by one.

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen also participated in this battle.

On the side of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Golden Crow Palace Lord led many palace masters such as the Qinglong Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, the White Tiger Palace Lord, and the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, many emperors, and a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors to dispatch, and the formation even surpassed the formation of the Black Wind Mountain.

Although the strength of the three Nine Heavens forces was weaker, they also sent most of their combat power.

The remaining Eight Heaven Forces, Seven Heaven Forces, and Middle Three Heaven Forces also sent many Dao Ancestors to participate in the battle, otherwise it would take a long time for the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Black Wind Mountain, and the three Nine Heaven Forces alone to destroy so many forbidden Zergs.

......

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Countless Dao Ancestors pushed sideways, and killed the Forbidden Zerg when they encountered it, and it didn't take long for the Forbidden Zerg to be killed in less than 3 million numbers, and they were directly confined to the territory near the Forbidden Zerg's lair.

In the void of the dark forbidden realm, the forbidden zerg was pierced through the body by streamers and fell to death.

The Dao Ancestors continued to advance, and finally advanced to a place close to the Forbidden Zerg lair.

At this time, there were about 2 million Forbidden Zerg left, and almost all of them had returned to the Forbidden Zerg lair.

Obviously, the Forbidden Zerg knows very well that if all the Forbidden Zerg are still fighting outside, they will probably fall and die, so it is better to withdraw their strength inside the lair and rely on the home advantage to fight against the Dao Ancestors.

"Let's go inside!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord spoke.

The Miaofa Dao Ancestor also let the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain enter the Forbidden Zerg Lair, preparing to fight the Forbidden Zerg inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

And the Dao Ancestors of the other forces saw that the Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace were the first to kill them, and they also followed into the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

Forbidden Zerg Lair.

Dao ancestors poured in, and a large number of forbidden zergs attacked.

Inside the Forbidden Zerg lair, the strength of the Forbidden Zerg is stronger than in the outside world, and the strength of the Dao Ancestors is at most thirty percent.

It can be said that here, the commander-level taboo zerg directly crushed the invincible Dao Ancestor, and the elite-level taboo zerg directly crushed the strongest Dao ancestor.

However, there are too many Dao Ancestors, and the top combat power of the Forbidden Zerg is now too few.

Today, there are no more than a dozen lord-level taboo Zerg of the Forbidden Zerg, and now there are at most seven or eight left, and there are more than twenty Commander-level Taboo Zerg at most.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor directly stopped all the lord-level taboo zergs at once, and the Qinglong Palace Lord and their half-step domain ancestors were responsible for killing the commander-level taboo zerg, after all, inside the taboo zerg lair, the invincible Dao ancestors couldn't beat the commander-level taboo zerg at all, and they were even easily killed by the commander-level taboo zerg.

Therefore, the half-step domain ancestors need to fight against the commander-level taboo zerg.

Ye Tian directly faced an elite-level forbidden zerg, and most of the other supreme Dao ancestors couldn't defeat the elite-level forbidden zerg, but Ye Tian easily crushed the forbidden zerg.

"Shadow Thorn!"

The Sky Slaying Spear stabbed down with a single blow, directly penetrating an elite-level forbidden zerg, and instantly hit it hard.

After several more attacks, this elite-level forbidden zerg fell and died.

"The strength is suppressed too much, if it's in the outside world, I'll easily kill it with one blow!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he still did his best to kill the elite-level zerg.

As for the commander-level forbidden zerg, he couldn't do anything, not that he couldn't beat it, but it was difficult to kill one.

Killing the commander-level forbidden zerg is currently the task of the half-step domain ancestors, not the task of a mere supreme Dao ancestor.

Over time, the number of Forbidden Zerg decreased dramatically, soon dropping to a number of 1 million.

At this time, the Forbidden Insect Tree was still making Forbidden Zerg, but it couldn't create much Forbidden Zerg due to its lack of energy.

As a result, the Forbidden Insect Tree began to give birth to the Forbidden Insect King with all its might.

If someone came to the Forbidden Insect Tree, they could understand that countless insect cocoons began to wither and instantly turned into ashes, and the energy of these insect cocoons was transferred to the top insect king insect cocoon.

At the cost of sacrificing countless insect cocoons, coupled with the depletion of the origin of the Forbidden Insect Tree, it is possible to forcibly catalyze the Forbidden Insect King, and it is possible to breed the Insect King.

Soon, the breath of the forbidden insect tree became weaker and weaker, and gradually began to wither, while the aura of the insect king cocoon became stronger and stronger.

And with the withering of the Forbidden Insect Tree, problems began to appear in the entire Forbidden Insect Lair, and the suppression of the Dao Ancestors became lower and lower.

The Forbidden Insect Tree is the core energy of the Forbidden Zerg Nest, and the Forbidden Insect Tree is weak, and the Forbidden Zerg Nest will naturally have problems.

But the Forbidden Zerg can't do anything, if you don't do this, when the Forbidden Zerg is killed, what is the use of the Forbidden Zerg nest even if it is intact?

Therefore, they would rather let the Forbidden Zerg nest suffer great damage in order to catalyze the Worm King.

With the strength of the Worm King, once it is conceived, it will definitely be able to save the Forbidden Zerg.

When the time comes, it will take a long time for the Worm King to lead the Forbidden Zerg, and it will still be possible to repair the Forbidden Bug Tree and the Forbidden Zerg Nest.

800,000!

700,000!

600,000!

The number of forbidden zergs is getting smaller and smaller, and the pressure on the Dao Ancestors is getting less and less.

About three more days passed.

At this time, the number of forbidden zergs was less than 100,000, and a considerable number of them were elite-level taboo zergs.

And every elite-level taboo zerg basically needs more than ten supreme Dao ancestors to besiege it to barely be able to compete, and the top-level commander-level forbidden zerg can even save their lives in the hands of half-step domain ancestors.

Especially the most powerful commander-level forbidden zerg has not been hit hard until now, and its strength is incomparably powerful.

As for the lord-level forbidden zerg battlefield, although the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Palace Lord dragged down the lord-level forbidden zergs, they were also suppressed a large part of their strength here, while the strength of the lord-level forbidden zergs was enhanced.

Therefore, it would take a certain amount of time for the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Palace Master to kill these lord-level forbidden zergs.

However, as the Forbidden Insect Tree became weaker and weaker, the strength of the Golden Crow Palace Master and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor naturally became stronger, and the situation of the lord-level Forbidden Insect Clan was very dangerous.

Abrupt.

A lord-level forbidden zerg that had already been seriously injured was directly killed by the Golden Crow Palace Master with a sword.

Then, the other lord-level forbidden zergs also began to be seriously injured and on the verge of death, and the difference in strength between the two sides was too great!

"Miaofa Dao Ancestor, let's hurry up, don't let that insect king come out, otherwise it's going to be a big trouble!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord urged.
